response.justification: Wei Chen is a versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of broad full-stack, systems, and open-source experience, including genuine high-scale work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic and recent AI-agent tooling exposure. However, the role is a Principal/IC6 position centered on experimentation platforms, telemetry, metrics, and growth measurement — areas entirely absent from this resume. There is no evidence of A/B testing, feature-flagging systems, statistical analysis, or leading multi-team platform initiatives, and career history shows senior-level IC scope at small-to-mid companies rather than principal-level cross-organizational leadership.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, backend, embedded, and mobile, with strong testing/craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD)
Real high-scale distributed systems experience: low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby
Recent hands-on AI tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) matching the AI-first emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core of this role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: no evidence of leading multi-workstream initiatives or platforms adopted across multiple teams
Limited telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical analysis background; data aptitude for experimental analysis is unproven

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering fundamentals at scale
